text: There is an uncanny stillness here. The harsh blue glow in the first room bathes everything with an artificial coldness, casting sharp reflections in the glass. The space is both open and sterile, evoking a sense of waiting for something undefined. The second image, with its R+D mural and scattered monitors, speaks of innovation and restless striving—yet in this moment, it feels abandoned and eerily silent. My mind churns with questions about creation and purpose under fluorescent lights, and I find myself both intrigued and unsettled in this vacant place of ambition.
